results.title: Trial date set for suspect in Bibb County deputy’s death
results.description: A judge has set a September 28 trial date for Austin Hall, accused of killing Bibb County Deputy Brad Johnson during a chase four years ago.

results.title: Bee Gees tribute turning Summer Motion into discotheque
results.description: No jive-talking here. The New York Bee Gees tribute band is happily headed to Ashland’s Summer Motion pad. It is time to boogie down.

results.title: Toronto ticket prices surge for Ronaldo World Cup game as Vancouver’s plummets
results.description: Canada's defeat by Switzerland last Wednesday dashed the chances of Vancouver hosting the home team in the knockout rounds and instead it will see the Swiss take on Algeria.

DE-CIX expands Nordic presence with ‘AI-ready’ internet exchange in Stockholm
results.description: IX giant adds Sweden to tap into booming Scandinavian data center market

results.title: NITI report calls for streamlining visa approval processes to boost tourism
results.description: A NITI Aayog report highlights that India's visa system needs significant upgrades to match global tourism leaders, hindering repeat and high-value international travel. The government is urged to streamline complex regulations and approvals, which currently slow investment and limit tourism infrastructure development. Simplifying these processes is deemed crucial for boosting India's global tourism competitiveness and accessibility.
